name: d-i-a-systems
description: D.I.A. — Culture of Getting It Done. Premium streetwear.

scripts.build:netlify: mkdir -p dist/data dist/public/images dist/public/mockups && cp index.html store.html order-confirmation.html dist/ && cp data/products.json dist/data/ && cp -r public/images/. dist/public/images/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r public/mockups/. dist/public/mockups/ 2>/dev/null; echo '✓ D.I.A. build complete'
scripts.pod:from-mockup: npm run mockup:convert && npm run sync-printful && npm run ingest-store
scripts.pod:from-mockups:all: npm run mockup:convert:all && npm run sync-printful && npm run ingest-store
scripts.pod:new: npm run generate && npm run sync-printful && npm run ingest-store
scripts.pod:all: npm run generate:all && npm run sync-printful && npm run ingest-store

author: D.I.A. Systems
